properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v3 v1 v2 v3 v3 v3 v3 v4 v4 v4 v4 v4 v4 v3 v3 v4 v4 v4 v4 v4 v4 v5 v6 v5 v6 v7 v7 v7 v7 v7 v7 v8 v7 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v13 v14 v15 v13 v13

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: One thing I desire Only this I seek Just to dwell dwell dwell Here forever

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This will be my posture Laying at Your feet Oh just to dwell dwell dwell Here forever

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Dearest Father Closest Friend Most beautiful Most beautiful

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There are no words There's nothing left Our love sings to You Oh oh oh

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm so in love with You You're beautiful So beautiful

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I fix my eyes on You You're beautiful So beautiful

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: With just one look Everything changes I'm captivated I'll never be the same

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Everything changes I'm captivated I'll never be the same

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: With just one look With just one look

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: One look is enough One look is enough One look is enough to change everything With just one look

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: My life was changed My body was healed My family restored My life rescued with just one With just one look

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: My life was changed My life was changed My life was changed with just one With just one look

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: On Calvary, you looked at me On Calvary, you looked at me On Calvary, you looked at me With just one With just one look

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: You're not the only one looking He says I am looking too He says with just one look

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: I see my son and daughter And I dont have to second guess I dont have to second look (With just one) With just one look

verse.name: v16
verse.lines: Everything changes I'm captivated I'll never be the same With just one look
